text.title: Decision Analysis Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the decision-analysis methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Choose CRM platform → outcome-shaped DR-0007 with status quo + 2 vendors → 6 criteria all traced to BR-IDs → 5 stakeholder groups give weight vectors → reconcile to group weights (dispersion warning on C1 for Sec vs Ops) → sensitivity robustness 0.82 → recommend O2 with documented Sec dissent.

section.title: Resulting artefact
